head: 84e4f3dd 2026-07-14 19:42:01 +0200
branches_note: origin/main HEAD 84e4f3dd (#117 enable CLOUD). Fix branches (fix/engine-*, flip/prod-modules-on-cutover) are 1-2 commits ahead but those are the already-merged #114-#117 fixes; origin/dev is 2 ahead only for dev-scoped Kafka-topic isolation + a main->dev sync (no unmerged feature work). Main is the current state.

E1-S1.note: orvex/* tree mounted via the single OrvexRootModule.register() import (app.module.ts:137); engine-only-import-guard.sh + eslint no-@docmost/no-ee boundary rules; VANILLA byte-parity gate on ORVEX_MODULES_ENABLED.

E1-S2.note: patches-drift + frozen inline-edit-allowlist CI gate present (self-test fixtures), but it is a fuzzy patch-context matcher, not the FR-30 weighted hot-file conflict-hunk model; the allow-list ledger is EMPTY (entries:[]), not the 13-row ledger.

E1-S3.note: No overlay-rebase import runbook doc (docs/ holds only delivery-checklist.md + design/patches-drift-ci-design.md); no 15-item correctness-hardening allow-list class evidenced.

E1-S4.note: pg_advisory_xact_lock boot-migrate (service.ts:70/82) + orvex_migrations ledger table (service.ts:113) + renamed-migration duplicate trap tested in orvex-migrator.spec.ts; concurrency spec covers the lock.

E2-S1.note: orvex_page_meta side table carries governance/lifecycle/provenance + version/content_hash; provenance trio migrated off pages via INSERT..SELECT; upstream pages kept stock (fresh port, not a column move); read-parity covered by migration + service specs.

E2-S2.note: Typed PM-JSON apply-ops chokepoint with casIncrementMeta CAS guard, 409 on ifVersion mismatch, atomic-or-409; race + e2e tests.

E2-S3.note: FR-13 ACL primitive: evalPage page-level eval (orvex-permissions.service.ts:101) + batch delta-pull ACL intersection (internal-api filterAccessiblePages); tested.

E2-S4.note: exportPage markdown/text_repr (FR-18/38) with a tenant-isolation IDOR guard before ExportService fetch (internal-api.service.ts:137); real audit-service present; tested.

E2-S5.note: aiAuthored provenance stamp on REST + collab (updatePageContent markAiAuthored) with provenance trio in orvex_page_meta; service + collab handler specs.

E2-S6.note: Transclusion-impact primitive + safeguard interceptor on destructive mutation of a transcluded source; interceptor + service + impact-controller specs.

E2-S7.note: FR-40 lifecycle (supersede/promote/status/archive) + superseded-tree discovery filter + ws lifecycle broadcaster riding orvex_page_meta; integration specs.

E3-S1.note: @orvex/dfm package extracted (pmToDfm/dfmToJson/registry/errors) with real round-trip for the covered paragraph subset + honesty-contract throws for uncovered types; opaque-fence round-trip is a TYPED SIGNATURE that throws DFM_NOT_IMPLEMENTED (pm-to-dfm.ts:84); engine write-path does not yet import it (only llms + one import test do).

E3-S2.note: Local golden fixtures exist but no cross-repo Go-twin conformance (no orvex-studio-contracts fixture wiring); no dedicated DfM import-boundary guard script found (only the general engine-only-import-guard).

E4-S1.note: Entitlement reader with short-TTL cache + HTTP billing port, fail-closed only when port fails and no cached projection (service.ts:57); no-hardcoded-caps spec enforces caps come from the entitlement.

E4-S2.note: Quota pre-flight enforced at page-create/attachment-upload/member-add/import chokepoints (assertWithinQuota/assertIncrementWithinQuota) with integration specs, but currentUsage is a DB count/aggregate passed by the caller — the Redis fast-counter O(1) mechanism is NOT implemented.

E4-S3.note: 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED domain exception (QuotaExceededException) present and thrown/marshalled at the chokepoints; hardening extras (deep-link/largest-files payload, members 110% JIT) not evidenced.

E4-S4.note: No Redis fast-counter exists, so no O(changed) counter-reconciliation sweep and no fail-closed-storage/fail-open-cheap Redis-loss counter path; the entitlement cache fail-closed is a different seam.

E4-S5.note: Quota-state query endpoint present (GET /orvex/quota); no history-retention prune cron (no @Cron/ScheduleModule singleton for history pruning).

E5-S1.note: Transactional outbox enqueue(trx,event) in the mutation's own trx incl the collab onStoreDocument content-write path (integration spec ENG-1383 F5); atomicity + rollback tests.

E5-S2.note: Worker relay drains outbox to a real CloudEvents 1.0 structured-mode envelope on Kafka, exactly-once with crash-retry idempotency (spec AC3/AC4), envelope conforms to pinned _envelope.json.

E5-S3.note: orvexcell + orvextenant extension attrs + correlation_id present on the emitted envelope; but the relay publishes to a single getKafkaOutboxTopic(), not per-domain {domain}-events.{cell} topics, and there is no dedicated relay liveness/lag heartbeat probe.

E5-S4.note: workspace.deleted durable outbox event present (EVT_WORKSPACE_DELETED, emitted from workspace.service); the user-removal path emits AuditEvent.USER_DELETED (audit only) — no durable user.deleted outbox event constant for cross-service cleanup.

E6-S1.note: Clean-room api-key under core/api-key with hashed keys + scopes migration + bearer guard; jwt.strategy no longer imports ee/api-key; contract spec.

E6-S2.note: POST /api/orvex/session/exchange consumes an RS256/JWKS exchange token -> createSessionAndToken; native-login guard blocks native login; verifier + service specs.

E6-S3.note: AGPL §13 source-offer @Public endpoint returning {sha,sourceRepo} present (typed defect if unset, never fabricated); LICENSE-COMPLIANCE doc + git source-mirror not found in the tree.

E7-S1.note: CLOUD-mode boot + hostname->workspace resolver (domain.middleware, spec'd) + CLOUD-mode session-mint exemptions in main.ts; #117 enabled CLOUD multi-tenant on the prod engine.

E7-S2.note: No transaction-scoped fail-closed RLS: no set_config tenant binding, no CREATE POLICY / ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY migration, no cross-tenant bytes=0 probe.

E7-S3.note: No polymorphic user-or-org tenant model and no personal->Teams upgrade re-key pass; tenancy is workspace-keyed only.

E7-S4.note: Billing read moved to the HTTP entitlement port, but upstream Stripe seat-sync is NOT severed (STRIPE_SEATS_SYNC queue at queue.constants.ts:30, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY still read at environment.service.ts:249) and the in-engine billing migration is NOT retired.

E7-S5.note: The tenant status column exists (workspace.constants.ts:13) but is unwired — no FR-22 suspension enforcement blocking mutate/non-read/export surfaces and no push-invalidation.

E8-S1.note: Yjs/Hocuspocus server schema built from the shared tiptap extensions (yjs.util.ts:22, collaboration.util.ts:144); collab handler + persistence specs; React client ProseMirror editors present under apps/client/src/ee.

E8-S2.note: Thin AI/MCP client affordances (ee/ai-chat) + engine llms surface; client-ai-thinness CI gate enforces zero server-side AI logic (D-S4 exception); controller spec.

E8-S3.note: No /docs Swagger anywhere (no SwaggerModule/DocumentBuilder); internal-only API with global-prefix-exclude + product-family-agnostic configured endpoints; e2e + mcp-parity specs.

E9-S1.note: Typed step-API (quiesce/export/import/activate) + TenantMoveManifest DTO + mandatory Idempotency-Key header present; moveCell delegates to identity Registry.Move (real, spec'd), but the four content-pipeline steps are deliberate 501 stubs and no coverage-checked TENANT_MOVE.md exists.

E9-S2.note: Per-dependency liveness health (HTTP 200 with per-dep status body) present + e2e/service specs; explicit CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME echo, dedicated per-role relay/collab-WS probes, and load-bearing ADR-NNNN draft files not evidenced.

summary: Merged origin/main carries a substantial, well-tested orvex/* engine: 18 of 35 stories are present with meaningful tests (thin-fork foundation, page_meta side table + apply-ops/ACL/export/provenance/transclusion/lifecycle primitives, entitlement reader, transactional outbox->Kafka relay, api-key + session-mint auth, CLOUD boot, collab schema, internal-only API). 12 are partial (quota enforcement lacks the Redis fast-counter; DfM extracted but opaque round-trip stubbed; event cell-topic/heartbeat, user.deleted, source-mirror, Stripe sever, tenant-move content steps, and health cell-echo incomplete). 5 are absent (import runbook/hardening allow-list, counter reconciliation, RLS isolation, polymorphic tenant, suspension enforcement) — the isolation/hardening frontier is the real gap.
